heading: Small business advocacy and assistance

children.text: encourage the participation of small business concerns, including socially and economically disadvantaged small business concerns (as defined in ), in procurement, research, development, demonstration, and commercial application activities, including product development, technology licensing, and technology transfer activities conducted by the National Laboratory or single-purpose research facility;section 637(a)(4) of title 15

report to the Director of the National Laboratory or single-purpose research facility on the actual participation of small business concerns in the activities described in paragraph (1) along with recommendations, if appropriate, on how to improve participation;
make available to small business concerns facilities, training, mentoring, and information on how to participate in the activities described in paragraph (1);
increase the awareness inside the National Laboratory or single-purpose research facility of the capabilities and opportunities presented by small business concerns; and

establish guidelines and metrics for the programs under subsections (b) and (c) and report on the effectiveness of the program to the Director of the National Laboratory or single-purpose research facility.

children.heading: Establishment of small business assistance program
children.label: b Establishment of small business assistance program

children.text: assistance directed at making the small business concerns more effective and efficient subcontractors or suppliers to the National Laboratory or single-purpose research facilities; or
general technical assistance, the cost of which shall not exceed $10,000 per instance of assistance, to improve the products or services of the small business concern.

children.label: i
children.text: the Director of each National Laboratory; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the Director of each single-purpose research facility.

children.heading: National Laboratory
children.label: B National Laboratory
children.text: The term “National Laboratory” has the meaning given the term in .section 15801 of this title

children.heading: Program
children.label: C Program
children.text: The term “program” means the program established under paragraph (2).

children.heading: Small business concern
children.label: D Small business concern
children.text: The term “small business concern” has the meaning given such term in .section 632 of title 15

children.label: A
children.text: to achieve the goal described in subsection (a)(1); and

children.label: B
children.text: to improve the products, services, and capabilities of small business concerns in the mission space of the Department.

children.label: A
children.text: research, development, demonstration, technology transfer, skills training and workforce development, or commercial application activities; or

children.label: B
children.text: any other activities that the applicable Director determines appropriate.

children.label: A
children.text: small business concerns selected to receive a voucher under the program; and

children.label: B
children.text: the National Laboratories and single-purpose research facilities.

children.heading: Cost-sharing requirement
children.label: 5 Cost-sharing requirement
children.text: In carrying out the program, the Secretary shall require cost-sharing in accordance with .section 16352 of this title

children.heading: Report
children.label: 6 Report
children.text: In accordance with , the Secretary shall report annually on the progress and implementation of the small business voucher program established under this section, including the number and locations of small businesses that received grants under this program.section 16391a of this title

children.heading: Use of funds
children.label: d Use of funds
children.text: None of the funds expended under subsection (b) may be used for direct grants to small business concerns.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: e Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for activities under subsection (b) $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2006 through 2008 and for activities under subsection (c) $25,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2027.
